notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile grounds into a double play, first baseman Jonathan Aranda to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Keibert Ruiz out at 2nd. Daylen Lile out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Crews pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews lines out to second baseman Richie Palacios.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Young reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Jonathan Aranda, assist to third baseman Junior Caminero. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Curtis Mead batting, Jacob Young picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Richie Palacios.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead grounds out softly, pitcher Garrett Cleavinger to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Catcher Keibert Ruiz picks off Cedric Mullins at 3rd on throw to third baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.
